api_token.description: Segment Public API access token, sent as a Bearer token (Authorization: Bearer <api_token>). Never logged.

base_url.description: Segment Public API base URL override for tests, proxies, or a region-specific endpoint (e.g. https://api.eu1.segmentapis.com). Takes precedence over any region-based derivation legacy performed in code; see docs.md's Known limits.
